features: Package Includes: 1000 Fluffy Pom Poms Assorted Colours - 10mm. Rainbow colors including black, white, red, orange, yellow, green, blue, purple, brown, etc. These pom poms with colors are ideal for both kids and adults to make crafts projects.

Soft Pom Poms: Our pom poms set are made of quality polypropylene, good in shape, fluffy and touches comfortable, as no smell, non-toxic, colorfast. Create your own artworks with these pompoms, stimulate your imagination and creativity.

Perfect for DIY Craft: These colorful pom poms can serve as various decorations for making dolls, kid projects and crafts. Our soft fuzzy balls are an interesting tool for identifying colors, which can improve your child's sensorial skills and encourage children to use these pompoms balls.

Wide Usage: It is a perfect accessory for any occasions and can use for any DIY craft projects. The pom poms can be used for handicrafts, clothing, shoes and hats accessories, craft gifts, children's toys, school projects, or daily life to add a festive atmosphere and bring festive joy to the family.
No Risk: Please don't worry about the quality, and buy safely! Note: Small parts. Not Suitable for children under 3 years. To be used under the direct supervision of an adult.
